name: Bill Stoudt

contactInfo.office: 101 E. Methvin St., Suite 200, Longview, TX 75601

bio: Bill Stoudt serves as the Gregg County Judge, the presiding officer of the Commissioners Court and chief executive of Gregg County. He oversees county operations including the budget, emergency management, and county infrastructure serving the greater Longview area.
campaignPromises: Support economic development in the Longview area
Run an open and transparent county government
